channel.title: State-Capitalism on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in State-Capitalism on Archive 03

item.title: Wall Street Legend Warns of 'The Slow Plunder of the State': How to Protect Our Assets?
item.description: An analysis of the ‘Slow Plunder of the State’ and the era of state capitalism as warned by legendary Wall Street strategist Russell Napier. We propose practical strategies to protect assets using gold and Bitcoin amidst the collapse of bonds and the rise of national strategic assets.
